name: coTfs Level 2 functions
title: coTfs Level 2 functions
description: This section contains a brief listing of all Level 2 functions that are made available by the CANopen Test Feature Set node layer.
tables: Removes all entries (of a node) from the internally-stored list.
Waits for an emergency message of a particular node.
Returns received emergency messages (of a node).
A test is executed for a heartbeat consumer.
The heartbeat producer of a CANopen® device is checked.
Excludes a single node-ID from monitoring.
Excludes a range of node-IDs from monitoring.
Includes a single node-ID for monitoring.
Includes a range of node-IDs for monitoring.
Sets the LSS timeout for the passive communication monitor.
Sets the NMT timeout for the passive communication monitor.
Sets the SDO timeout for the passive communication monitor.
Gets the maximum, minimum, and average value of an active monitor.
Gets parameter of an active monitor.
Configures and activates a generic message monitor.
Stops a generic message monitor and evaluate monitoring results.
Checks if the expected message data are received during a generic message monitoring.
The DUT Device Under Test is set to state "Pre-Operational".
The DUT is commanded to execute a "Reset Communication".
The DUT is commanded to execute a "Reset Node".
The DUT is set to state "Operational".
The DUT is set to state "Stopped".
The DUT waits for a NMT boot-up message.
Adds a single object to the internal list of test objects.
Adds a list of object entries to the internal list, which only differ in the given index.
Adds a list of object entries to the internal list, which only differ in the given sub index.
Expands the allowed value range of the last created object entry.
Expands the allowed value range of the last created object entry with a given value.
Checks a single object dictionary entry of existence and size via a SDO upload.
Checks if the given object does not exist in the object dictionary.
Deletes all objects of the internal test object list.
Executes an user defined object dictionary test on hidden objects.
Executes an user defined object dictionary test considering access type, data type and default values.
Controls the abort behavior of the test module.
Executes a complete SDO block download.
Executes a complete SDO block upload.
Executes a SDO upload. The data received are checked against predefined data.
Executes a SDO download, followed by a SDO upload. The data received are checked against predefined data.
Returns the received SDO data of an expedited/segmented/block upload.
Returns the size of the received SDO data of an expedited/segmented/block upload.
Stops a test after a specified number of CAN messages.
Checks if an object is readable.
Waits for the occurrence of a SDO abort message from a particular node.
Wait for specific SDO abort codes.
Returns the received SDO abort code.
Adds a specific abort code to the internal list of accepted abort codes.
Checks for successful execution of a SDO command with a valid SDO abort code.
Checks for unexpected SDO abort codes.
Starts a freely-configurable SYNC producer test. This test requires the existence of the optional sync counter.
Configures a TPDO as cyclic and starts a virtual sync producer. Checks the transmit performance of the test node.
Configures the event timer of the TPDO and check the transmit cycle.
Gets the COB-ID and transmit the TPDO data read with a remote frame.
Sends a Switch state global LSS mode message.
Waits for a Switch state global LSS mode message.
Sends a Switch state selective messages and waits for the response.
Waits for a Switch state selective messages and sends the response.
Sends a Configure LSS node-ID request and waits for the response.
Sends the LSS Configure node-ID response.
Sends a Configure LSS bit timing parameters request and waits for the response.
Waits for Configure LSS bit timing parameters request.
Sends the Configure LSS bit timing parameters response.
Sends an Activate LSS bit timing parameter request.
Waits for an Activate LSS bit timing parameter request.
Sends a LSS Store Configuration request and waits for the response.
Waits for the LSS store configuration request and sends the response.
Sends an Inquire node-ID request and waits for the response.
Waits for the Inquire node-ID request and sends the response.
Sends an Inquire vendor-ID request and waits for the response.
Waits for the Inquire vendor-ID request and sends the response.
Sends an Inquire product code request and waits for the response.
Waits for the Inquire product code request and sends the response.
Sends an Inquire revision number request and waits for the response.
Waits for the Inquire revision number request and sends the response.
Sends an Inquire serial number request and waits for the response.
Waits for the Inquire serial number request and sends the response
Sends a LSS identify remote slave sequence.
Waits for a LSS identify remote slave sequence.
Sends an Identify slave protocol response message.
Waits for the Identify slave protocol response message.
Sends an Identify non-configured remote slave response.
Waits for an Identify non-configured remote slave response.
Sends an Identify non-configured remote slave response.
Waits for an Identify non-configured slave response.
Sends a LSS FastScan protocol request.
Clears the internal list of expected LSS Master requests and answers.
Waits for a configured LSS Master request.
Adds a LSS Master request wait condition to the internal list.
Adds a LSS Master request wait condition to the internal list.
Adds a LSS Master request wait condition to the internal list.
Adds a LSS Master request wait condition to the internal list.
Adds a LSS Master request wait condition to the internal list.
Adds a LSS Master request wait condition to the internal list.
Adds a LSS Master request wait condition to the internal list.
Adds a LSS Master request wait condition to the internal list.
Adds a LSS Master request wait condition to the internal list.
Adds a LSS Master request wait condition to the internal list.
Adds a LSS Master request wait condition to the internal list.
Adds a LSS Master request wait condition to the internal list.
Adds a LSS Master request wait condition to the internal list.
Sets the bit masks for using the function coTfsLssAddMasterResponseIdentifyNonConfRemoteSlv.
Adds a LSS Master request wait condition to the internal list.
